assertions.reason: OpenAPI snapshot and controller inspection confirm only canonical routes exist: PUT /api/v1/superadmin/tenants/{id}/lifecycle and PUT /api/v1/superadmin/tenants/{id}/limits. All retired aliases (suspend/activate/deactivate POST verbs, lifecycle-state PUT, company-scoped runtime-policy routes, admin runtime-policy routes) are absent from openapi.json and asserted missing in OpenApiSnapshotIT lines 316-322. SuperAdminController exposes only the canonical lifecycle and limits PUT endpoints with no legacy aliases.

TenantRuntimeAccessService exists at erp-domain/src/main/java/com/bigbrightpaints/erp/core/security/TenantRuntimeAccessService.java but is NOT imported or referenced anywhere in request-facing main sources. Grep for 'TenantRuntimeAccessService' in src/main/java found only the class definition itself with no consumers. Request admission flows through TenantRuntimeRequestAdmissionService -> TenantRuntimeEnforcementService, which is fail-closed: missing company context returns denied (403), company lookup unavailability returns 503, unrecognized persisted states default to BLOCKED, and settings/audit faults deny safely with appropriate error codes.

commands.observation: OpenAPI contains only canonical superadmin tenant lifecycle and limits routes at /api/v1/superadmin/tenants/{id}/lifecycle (PUT) and /api/v1/superadmin/tenants/{id}/limits (PUT). Retired routes verified absent: /api/v1/superadmin/tenants/{id}/suspend (POST), /api/v1/superadmin/tenants/{id}/activate (POST), /api/v1/superadmin/tenants/{id}/deactivate (POST), /api/v1/superadmin/tenants/{id}/lifecycle-state (PUT), /api/v1/companies/{id}/tenant-runtime/policy (PUT), /api/v1/admin/tenant-runtime/policy (PUT).
SuperAdminController.java exposes only canonical lifecycle/limits PUT endpoints via SuperAdminTenantControlPlaneService. No legacy suspend/activate/deactivate endpoints present.

TenantRuntimeAccessService grep in src/main/java found only 1 file: the class definition itself at com/bigbrightpaints/erp/core/security/TenantRuntimeAccessService.java. No imports or usages in any filter, controller, interceptor, or service. CompanyContextFilter uses TenantRuntimeRequestAdmissionService (not TenantRuntimeAccessService).

TenantRuntimeEnforcementService.admitRequest() implements fail-closed semantics: null/blank companyCode returns notTracked admission, missing company falls through to deny, unrecognized persisted states parse to BLOCKED fallback, and settings-repository exceptions throw TenantRuntimePolicyResolutionFailure (503).

OpenApiSnapshotIT lines 316-322 explicitly asserts retired runtime-policy aliases are missing from the OpenAPI contract, and lines 367-368/387-388 assert docs contain only canonical lifecycle/limits routes.
